description:
A small Bureau contract: clear a reported bandit raid on the east road. One or two bandits. No story, no hooks — just a fight. When it's done the player has the option to walk back to Vask for the payout.

Triggers:
1. On encounter start (mission_intro — aigm): brief beat establishing the road and the bandits coming into sight. Single short paragraph; do not stall the fight.
2. When the last enemy dies (mission_done — set_flag): sets `mission_complete=true`, clears `mission_pending`, and tells the player to take the LEAVE MISSION button back to Vask.
3. (mission_done_aigm — aigm): pairs with the flag-set above so the AIGM gives the cleanup beat ("road is quiet again") and points the player to Vask without lingering.
customIntroduction: The east road runs straight out of the station and into open ground. About a quarter-mile out you spot them — two figures crouched at the side of the road, watching the wagon-track. They mark you the moment you mark them. There is no cover and no time to talk this through.
customContext: BANDIT MISSION — SIMPLE CONTRACT FIGHT. Two bandits, hostile from the start, no parley, no surrender, no reinforcements. Player completes when both are dead — engine fires the LEAVE MISSION beat automatically via the trigger. Do NOT narrate the player walking back to the station; the LEAVE MISSION button handles the transition.
objective: Defeat the bandits. Return to Vask.

then.message: Open at the east road. Two bandits ahead. One short paragraph, then the fight starts on the player's next move.
Contract complete. Return to Vask to turn it in.
Both bandits are down. The road is quiet. Narrate a one-sentence cleanup beat, then point the player to the LEAVE MISSION button at the top of the screen so they can walk it back to Vask.
